essentials.alertRule: SQL Server Vulnerability Assessment - Public Network Access Enabled

properties.title: SQL Server Exposed to Public Internet
properties.description: The SQL Server sqlserver-drift-test has a firewall rule 'AllowAllInternet' allowing 0.0.0.0 to 255.255.255.255, violating CIS Azure benchmark 4.1.3.
properties.remediation: Delete the overly permissive firewall rule or restrict start_ip_address and end_ip_address to known private IP ranges.
properties.complianceFramework: CIS Microsoft Azure Foundations Benchmark v1.3.0
